title: 13RoomCraft
body:
# 13RoomCraft Official Modpacks for 13RoomCraft Server.
### !!!Read Before Downloading!!!
**13RoomCraft C&C is important to play in 13RoomCraft Server!**

*Except 13RoomCraft Vanilla Experience is a game performance improves mod. You can use to play other servers and singleplayer mode.


## This Modpacks have two versions.

### 13RoomCraft Mods Edition

This modpack is a quite lightweight(maybe) and has a mix of performance, content, quality of life, bugfix, and library mods. The mods that impact gameplay the most are Better Nether, Better End and Create (technology mod). Other mods that add content QOL mods added (some examples are Comforts, Traver's Backpack, and Fast Move.

There is a Xaero's Map that has a minimap in game. It is convivence to travel in game.

Create Mod that makes you to build a high-tech civilization and makes you a steampunk geek. (LOL)

Better experience with Nether & End. No more boring these two dimensions. It has lots of things to do and adventures.

### 13RoomCraft Vanilla Experience

This modpack is lightweight and focus on game performance and bugfix. This modpack is not impact gameplay. It makes you comfortable, high-performance gameplay. Just like its name, Vanilla Experience.

---

### Purpose

When I want to play minecraft with friends using modpacks but we can't add something into downloaded modpack, so I create this to make it easy to download client and play with my friend only for a specific server. It will be unlisted and can access with the link.



## 13RoomCraft Vanilla Experience


<details>
<summary>Dependencies</summary>

- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling/version/v0.19.0-1.20.x)

- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast/version/1.2.6+1.20.2)

- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3/version/8.0.1)

- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/version/12.0.109+fabric)

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/version/mc1.20.2-0.5.3)

- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined/version/r5.0.1)

- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/version/1.10.11+kotlin.1.9.20)

- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling/version/1.6.2-1.20.2)

- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium/version/1.0.27+mc1.20.1)

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.90.4+1.20.2)

- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris/version/1.6.10+1.20.2)

- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium/version/mc1.20.2-0.12.0)

- [ModrenFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix/version/5.9.0+mc1.20.2)

- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak/version/0.1.1+mc1.20.2)

- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
</details>

## 13RoomCraft Mods Edition

<details>
<summary>Mods List</summary>

- All of Vanila Experience Performance Mod.

- Create

- Teralith

- Ad Astra

- Aquamirae

- Traveler's Backpack

- Fast Move

- Lots of QOL Mods
</details>

---
### Mods/Resources Credits

**Resource Packs**
- Astraliyte's Animated Textures -> [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/astraliyte-s-animated-textures/)

(Project for playing with friends)
This project is intended for a specific server and not for general use.
